sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115758" key="yimuqi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψιμυθ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n115758.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ψιμυθιόω</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">paint with white lead,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
